problems.eyebrow: What we fix · in concrete numbers
problems.h: The work you can't get done. Shipped.
problems.lede: Pick the pain. We match price, time and delivery head to head against the old way of doing it. Every number below is from orders that ran on Golden Connect in the last 30 days.
problems.p1.before.p: 3-week onboarding, design review cycles, 2 sprints to ship the first version.
problems.p1.after.p: Brief → agent builds → operator supervises → deployed on your domain.
problems.p2.h: Buying ad creatives from an agency
problems.p2.before.p: 2-week revision cycle. Agency keeps the source files.
problems.p2.after.p: All variants + raw files yours. Tested across channels, winners flagged.
problems.p3.h: Hiring a tutor for a new subject
problems.p3.before.p: Scheduling, same pace for everyone, no materials kept between sessions.
problems.p3.after.p: AI builds your learning module under a top-specialist persona. App, bot, voiced lessons, diagrams, exercises. Keeps adapting.
problems.p4.h: Getting an NDA / terms / privacy drafted
problems.p4.before.p: Junior associate drafts, partner reviews, billed per revision.
problems.p4.after.p: Agent draft + licensed human lawyer review. Fully binding, exportable.
problems.p5.before.p: One human runs one channel. Content calendars missed. Engagement flat.
problems.p5.after.p: Telegram, TikTok, YouTube, X, Facebook, Instagram. Posted, tested, re-cut nightly.
problems.p6.before.p: Scope doc, Figma, staging, hand-off. 2–3 weeks end to end.
problems.p6.after.p: Menu, payments, auto-reply, FAQ, handoff to human. Live under your username.
problems.p7.before.p: 1–2 weeks, one pass, no access to raw sources afterwards.
problems.p7.after.p: Sources cited, exportable bibliography, one revision round included.
problems.p8.before.p: Separate vendors for contract, site, bot, community seed. Dates slip.
problems.p8.after.p: ERC-20 + LP + landing + Telegram bot + first 100 community seeds — all by one operator team.
